body.title: Verify /sprint + /commit runnable as Igor engrams
body.result: D355: All 21 skills seeded as engram nodes on boot. PROC_INVOKE_SPRINT + PROC_INVOKE_COMMIT habits created. Infrastructure gap fixed — skills were never seeded and had no trigger habits.
body.description: D317: skills are seeded as SKILL_* memory nodes but seeded != executable. Verify Igor can actually run SKILL_SPRINT_ENTRY and SKILL_COMMIT_ENTRY as engram cursor programs end-to-end on a real S ticket. Fix any gaps in node execution. This is the proof that Igor = Claude Code equivalent.
